base: v30 working sprite with cache reset and Auto Dari engine
diagnosis: Old service workers/caches can keep loading broken v20/v33 files even after upload; v34 unregisters them and reloads once.
Chrome 71+ and mobile browsers require user activation for speech/audio; v34 unlocks audio from Test/Play taps.
Dari Auto uses a device Farsi/Persian voice only if it really plays; otherwise it falls back to the working local sprite.
